headline: Citi Wealth Deploys 4-Tool AI Suite — AskWealth on Llama, CitiScribe to All NA Advisors, Client 360 Coming Q2
summary: Citi Wealth has deployed a suite of four AI tools for advisors, going well beyond the initial AskWealth and Advisor Insights pair announced in August 2025. AskWealth, a GenAI conversational assistant powered by Meta's Llama (with migration to Google Gemini planned), is now deployed globally to all Citi Wealth colleagues following a successful Asia launch (Citigroup press release, Aug 2025). CitiScribe, an automated meeting note-taking tool, deployed to all Wealth advisors in North America in Q1 2026. Client 360, which consolidates holdings, positions, call logs, and client interests into a single dashboard, is rolling out to all Wealth in Q2 2026. Portfolio Intelligence, a client-facing tool consolidating positions and CIO market insights, is live for Citi Private Bank in North America with global expansion planned for Q2 2026 (PYMNTS, 2026). All four tools extend Citi Stylus Workspaces, Citi's internal agentic AI platform launched September 2025. Both AskWealth and Advisor Insights went from concept to full development in just six months. Andy Sieg, Head of Wealth, described the tools as enabling advisors to 'surface investment opportunities at scale, flag potential risks, and determine the next course of action.'
the_so_what: Citi's four-tool strategy — covering meeting automation (CitiScribe), conversational research (AskWealth), proactive alerts (Advisor Insights), and client-facing portfolio intelligence — represents the broadest disclosed AI advisor suite at any global private bank. Goldman Sachs deployed its GS AI firmwide to 46,500 employees but as a single general-purpose tool; Citi is building specialised, workflow-specific agents. The competitive question is whether Citi's breadth-first approach (4 tools across different workflows) outperforms the depth-first approach (single integrated platform, fully embedded) that JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley are pursuing.

key_stat.label: deployed or deploying to Citi Wealth advisors — AskWealth (global), CitiScribe (NA), Client 360 (Q2 2026), Portfolio Intelligence (CPB NA)

capability_evidence.evidence: AskWealth deployed globally. CitiScribe deployed to all NA Wealth advisors Q1 2026. Client 360 rolling out Q2 2026. Portfolio Intelligence live for CPB NA. All built on Citi Stylus Workspaces agentic platform (launched Sep 2025).
capability_evidence.metric: 4 AI tools; concept to development in 6 months; $12B annual tech investment

people: Andy Sieg — Head of Wealth, Citi
Joe Bonanno — Head of Data, Analytics & Innovation, Citi Wealth

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Goldman Sachs GS AI (scaled, firmwide single tool), JPMorgan Connect Coach (deployed, single integrated platform)

_research.whats_new: 4-tool suite revealed (beyond initial AskWealth + Advisor Insights). CitiScribe deployed to all NA advisors Q1 2026. Client 360 and Portfolio Intelligence timelines disclosed. Citi Stylus Workspaces agentic platform. Llama→Gemini migration planned.
